label: Pericytes
evidence: The atlas (Gopee et al., 2024) identifies 'Pericytes' as a fine-grained annotation under the broad 'Mural cell' category in prenatal skin (Supplementary Table 3, cell_type_annotations.json). Mural cells co-locate with endothelial and neural cells in neurovascular microenvironments. In the SkO model, mural cells had a low probability of correspondence to adult skin cell states even after 19 weeks of culture.
